title: Jimmy identity/soul guidelines
description: Avoid double dashes in Jimmy's identity/soul folders; enforce a specific business CTA, or fallback to profile CTA.
full_idea: Remember to add into Jimmy’s identity and soul folders to not use double dashes and to use a specific business CTA, or check out my profile CTA
source_text: Remember to add into Jimmy’s identity and soul folders to not use double dashes and to use a specific business CTA, or check out my profile CTA
